title: sphinctanthus aurantiacus
intro: Sphinctanthus aurantiacus, also known as the Orange Sphinctanthus, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of shrub native to Mexico and Central America, known for its bright orange flowers and medicinal properties. Sphinctanthus aurantiacus has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal compounds to be extracted and utilized for health benefits.
